Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Engineer]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Engineer position is for Aether Technicians or those with exceptional compatibility for Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — An Engineer is a role or profession that can be filled by candidates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 41''' — The Engineer is one of the dark tablets on the ship's walls.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 2''' — The Engineer is located with Doctor Mell and can return Horizon to prime condition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — The Engineer is a master Aether Technician whose gift is androids.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — The Engineer can integrate almost any system into a humanoid robot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — The crew needs an Engineer to get out of the system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — The Engineer is a new member of the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — The Engineer is a role or title that Mell asks about.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Shyrax addresses the Engineer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Engineer is a character mentioned by Doctor Cryce.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — The Engineer is a character who deploys drones.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
